product: Databricks Runtime 17.1 and Databricks Runtime 17.1 ML are in Beta
tagline: Databricks Runtime 17.1 and Databricks Runtime 17.1 ML are now in Beta.
what_it_does: Databricks Runtime 17.1 and Databricks Runtime 17.1 ML are now in Beta. These releases include improvements to streaming, SQL functions, and connector behavior, along with reliability and performance enhancements across the platform.
why_it_matters: These releases include improvements to streaming, SQL functions, and connector behavior, along with reliability and performance enhancements across the platform.
plain_summary: Databricks Runtime 17.1 and Databricks Runtime 17.1 ML are now in Beta. These releases include improvements to streaming, SQL functions, and connector behavior, along with reliability and performance enhancements across the platform.
key_takeaway: Databricks Runtime 17.1 and Databricks Runtime 17.1 ML are now in Beta.
